ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "pdb_code" TEXT /* PDB code of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the protein record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the protein record was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the protein is associated with */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who added the protein */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the protein structure */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the protein structure */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the protein */,
  "expression_system" TEXT /* Expression system used to produce the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helices" (
  "helix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helix */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the helix belongs to */,
  "helix_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the helix */,
  "helix_end" INTEGER /* End position of the helix */,
  "kink_position" INTEGER /* Position of the kink within the helix */,
  "helix_type" TEXT /* Type of the helix (e.g., alpha, beta) */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the helix */,
  "rise" REAL /* Rise of the helix */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the helix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helices_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kinks" (
  "kink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kink */,
  "helix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the helix the kink belongs to */,
  "kink_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the kink */,
  "kink_end" INTEGER /* End position of the kink */,
  "kink_angle" REAL /* Angle of the kink */,
  "kink_type" TEXT /* Type of the kink (e.g., sharp, gradual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kink_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kinks_helix_id FOREIGN KEY ("helix_id") REFERENCES helices ("helix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structural_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "helix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the helix the metrics belong to */,
  "n_radius" REAL /* Radius of the N-terminus */,
  "n_rmsd" REAL /* Root Mean Square Deviation (RMSD) of the N-terminus */,
  "c_radius" REAL /* Radius of the C-terminus */,
  "c_rmsd" REAL /* Root Mean Square Deviation (RMSD) of the C-terminus */,
  "estimated_error" REAL /* Estimated error of the helix structure */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Validation score for the helix structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_metrics_helix_id FOREIGN KEY ("helix_id") REFERENCES helices ("helix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used for the access (e.g., search terms, filters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the annotation is for */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the annotation */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein in the interaction */,
  "protein_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the interaction (e.g., binding, dimerization) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction record was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the interaction record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_protein_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_2") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_protein_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_1") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the mutation is in */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the mutation */,
  "wild_type" TEXT /* Wild type residue */,
  "mutant" TEXT /* Mutant residue */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the mutation (e.g., destabilizing, stabilizing) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mutation record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mutation record was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the mutation record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mutation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the reference is for */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of the reference (e.g., publication, dataset) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of the reference */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reference record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reference record was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the reference record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reference record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structural_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structural variant */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the variant is for */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the structural variant (e.g., isoform, splice variant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the structural variant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variant record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant record was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the variant record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_variants_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_variants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the version is for */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the image is for */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., 3D model, 2D projection) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the image */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_images_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_images_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who submitted the proposal */,
  "grant_agency" TEXT /* Grant agency (e.g., NIH, NSF) */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the proposal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proposal */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date the proposal was submitted */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Funding status of the proposal (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_proposals_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the publication is associated with */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publication was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the meeting is associated with */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Meeting notes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the meeting notes were created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the meeting notes were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_meetings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
